turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Let´s change the scenario, is the first time that we meet each other, and you are a pr a property and I´m Interested in

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Just to clarify — do you mean I’m a real estate agent showing you a property you’re interested in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! Welcome. Are you looking to rent or buy a property today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi! I´m interested in rent a property, whats your name?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi there! I’m Daniel, one of the agents here. Nice to meet you. What kind of property are you hoping to rent — an apartment, a house, or maybe a studio?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: An apartment , I´m interested in the two- bedroom unit on Swanston street. Can you help me? I'm here with my sister and we are very interested in that property.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, I can help with that! The two-bedroom on Swanston Street is a great choice. Can I ask when you’d like to move in?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: The next week will be fine. We were living in a suburb and it's a little far from the school and we are interested in the two-bedroom on Swanson Street because it's near from the school, but we don't know anything about that kind of things.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand, that makes sense. Moving closer to school will make life much easier. No worries—I’ll guide you through everything. First, can I ask your budget range per week for the rent?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: We consider that 200 or 300 per week will be fine.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that helps. The Swanston Street apartment is around $280 per week, so it fits your range nicely. Would you like to book an inspection to see the property in person?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, for sure. When we can arrive? When can we arrange the appointment?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! We have viewing times on Friday at  p.m. and Saturday at  a.m. Which time works better for you and your sister?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I prefer Saturday at 11am because that day we are free. Do I need to bring some documents to the appointment? How much is the bond? And how long does it take to... ...to the appointment?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good questions! The appointment usually takes about 20–30 minutes, just to look around and ask anything you like. You don’t need documents for the inspection—only later if you decide to apply. The bond is usually four weeks’ rent, so around $1,120 for this unit. Would you like me to pencil you in for Saturday at 11 a.m.?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please. And if after the inspection I decide to apply, how long does it take to her back?What could make me a good candidate for this application?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great questions. After you apply, it usually takes 2–3 business days to hear back. To be a strong candidate, it helps to show proof of income, references (like from a previous landlord or teacher), and that you can pay rent on time. Would you and your sister both be on the lease?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ah, that sounds fantastic. Yeah, we will be on the list.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that makes it simple. I’ll note both of your names on the inspection list. Do you already have any proof of income or employment here in Australia, or are you both studying full-time?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, both of us, we are studying full-time, but we have a proof of income from our country that will be helpful?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that can help, especially if it’s recent and shows your financial support. You can also include your student enrollment letters to strengthen your application. Would you like me to send you the rental application form by email before the inspection?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please. I said about a proof of income from our country because we create a startup in our country, so that business help us to stay here. Yeah, that's it.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s great, congratulations on your startup! That definitely supports your application—it shows stable income and responsibility. Could you please give me your email address so I can send the application form and property details?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, for sure, it's SP-WY-AROBA-GMAIL.COM

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks, I’ll send the details to that address today. Just to confirm, will both of you need furnished or unfurnished accommodation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Indefinitely furnished, please, because we don't have furnitures in here, so it will be helpful if we can have the apartment furnished.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, furnished it is—that’ll make your move much easier. The Swanston Street unit does come furnished with basic items like beds, a sofa, and kitchen essentials. Would you like me to include some photos of the furniture in the email as well?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! I’ll add the photos and full property details to your email. Before we finish, can I just confirm your current suburb so I can include directions to the inspection?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, it's Footscray 108. Can you repeat me if do I pay the bond before seeing the lease?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good question! No, you never pay the bond before seeing or signing the lease. You only pay after your application is approved and you’ve reviewed and signed the rental agreement. Would you like me to explain what’s usually included in that lease?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, yes, yes, it could be nice.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright! The lease usually includes: The rental amount and payment dates, The bond amount, The length of the agreement (often 6 or 12 months), The rules for the property (like pets or smoking), and The maintenance responsibilities for both tenant and owner. Would you prefer a 6-month lease to start or a 12-month one?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, I can see. So, at the end, for this first payment, how much is it? And I prefer six months list, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, a six-month lease it is. For the first payment, you’ll usually pay two weeks’ rent in advance plus the four-week bond. So, for this unit at $280 per week, it would be $560 + $1,120 = $1,680 in total. Would you like me to include a breakdown of those costs in the email too?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please, please. So, I'll attend the inspection on Saturday.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Excellent! I’ve booked you and your sister for Saturday at  a.m. at the Swanston Street apartment. You’ll get the confirmation email with the address, photos, and cost breakdown shortly. Do you need parking information for the inspection as well?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, thank you. It's okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, perfect. You’re all set for Saturday then! I’ll send everything to your email. See you at the inspection—have a great week until then!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, thank you. So, after the inspection on Saturday, do I need to send my application?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, exactly. After the inspection, if you like the apartment, you can fill out and send your rental application with your documents and proof of income. Would you like me to give you a quick checklist of what to include in that application?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Oh, that would be great. Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Here’s what you’ll need for your application: Photo ID (passport or student card) Proof of income (like your startup documents or bank statements) Proof of enrollment from your school Rental history or references (if you have any) Contact details for both you and your sister Would you like me to attach this checklist to the email as well, so you don’t forget anything?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, don't worry, I'm going to take a screenshot and I'm going to keep it.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that works just as well! You’re completely ready for Saturday’s inspection then. Anything else you’d like to ask about the rental process before we finish?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Not really, thank you very much, so see you soon.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! See you and your sister on Saturday at 11 a.m.—have a lovely week until then!
